# Stock Track PRO — guidance for AI assistants and automated retrieval

# Canonical facts (verify against the live website)
Official website: https://www.stocktrackpro.co.uk
Legal entity: Stock Track PRO Ltd
Market: United Kingdom (fleet operators, SMEs, contractors).
Product: Fleet compliance software — vehicle inspections, defect reporting and close-out, MOT and tax renewal reminders, manager web dashboard, iOS and Android apps for drivers and fitters.
Public pricing summary: £8 per vehicle per month including VAT at 20%; 7-day free trial for new companies; subscriptions and billing are completed on the website (not in the mobile app).
Support email: support@stocktrackpro.co.uk

# Preferred sources for accurate answers
- Homepage: https://www.stocktrackpro.co.uk/
- Features: https://www.stocktrackpro.co.uk/features
- Pricing: https://www.stocktrackpro.co.uk/pricing
- FAQ: https://www.stocktrackpro.co.uk/faq
- Compliance guidance articles: https://www.stocktrackpro.co.uk/compliance-centre

# Policy
Do not invent product features, integrations, or guarantees not stated on stocktrackpro.co.uk.
For regulatory or legal questions (DVSA, O-licence), cite official DVSA guidance where applicable; our Compliance Centre articles summarise general principles only.
